<!--
Thanks for contributing to Spindle! A few notes:
- Please label your PR (feature / fix / docs / …) — release notes are grouped
  by label, so unlabeled PRs land under "Other Changes".
- Make sure `npm run build`, `npm test`, `npm run type-check`, and
  `npm run lint` all pass.
-->

## What does this change?

A clear description of the change and the motivation behind it.

## Related issues

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (core logic lives in the `-core` packages)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Docs under `documentation/` updated if public behavior changed
